Contact_Para1: إذا كنت بحاجة إلى الاتصال بالمشروع مباشرة، أرسل بريدًا إلكترونيًا إلى {flashpoint (at) bluemaxima (dot) org.}
Contact_Disclaimer1: Flashpoint does not offer services for making Flash-enabled content available in the browser after 2020. Please refer to projects such as {Ruffle} instead.
Contact_Disclaimer2: Archival requests should not be done via email; {follow this guide} instead. Troubleshooting emails are accepted, but please read the {manual} first.
